_comment: SPDX-License-Identifier: MPL-2.0. Manifest of OpenBook branding assets. The SVGs in this directory are the canonical sources; the raster outputs below are generated at build time by the branding patch / packaging step (see branding/README.md). All artwork is original OpenBook work and contains no Firefox/Mozilla trademark (docs/OpenBook-Browser-Build-Plan.md section 13).

sources.icon.svg: Master application icon (open-book glyph on rounded tile). Source for every raster app icon.
sources.about-logo.svg: Wordmark + glyph shown on about: surfaces and the About dialog (about:logo).
sources.default-favicon.svg: Fallback favicon for pages/about: pages with no icon; simplified for 16px legibility.

from_icon_svg.firefox.ico: Windows multi-resolution icon containing 16/24/32/48/64/128/256 (named firefox.ico because upstream packaging expects that path; contents are OpenBook art).
from_icon_svg.firefox.icns: macOS iconset (16..1024 @1x/@2x) packed to .icns (path name retained for upstream packaging; OpenBook art).

generated_rasters.notes: Raster names mirror the upstream browser/branding/<channel>/ layout so the branding patch maps 1:1. Retaining upstream FILE names (e.g. firefox.ico) is required by packaging code paths; the IMAGE CONTENT is 100% OpenBook and carries no Mozilla mark.

generation: Rasters are produced from the SVGs via a deterministic converter (e.g. rsvg-convert / resvg) during the build so the repo stays text-only and reviewable. Command examples are in branding/README.md.
